channel.title: bitHuman for Mac
channel.description: On-device voice + video chat for macOS. Made by bitHuman.

item.title: Version 0.8.1
item.description:
Major engine + UX update. Same on-device runtime; new metering and pre-chat polish.

  • API key + heartbeat metering for the avatar engine — bundled into the .app, so end users authenticate without setup. 2 credits/min, 5-minute offline grace.
  • Pre-quantized int4 expression engine — DiT + Wav2Vec2 baked at int4, ANE wav2vec2 path. Active speech-time peak ~5.5 GB (down from ~11 GB).
  • Pre-chat warm-up gate with progress arc + agent portrait. Agent swap fades the new face in mid-warm-up and silences the previous voice mid-sentence.
  • TTS-friendly LLM prompt suffix — no emoji / markdown / decorative symbols in spoken output.

See the v0.8.1 SDK release for the underlying changes.

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description:
First signed release of the bitHuman desktop app.

  • Same on-device engine as bithuman-cli (Gemma 4 E2B LLM, Qwen3-TTS / Kokoro, bitHuman expression engine)
  • Floating circular avatar window — drag-drop a portrait to swap the face, right-click for the agent gallery / voice / prompt pickers
  • 8 bundled agents (Diego, Nova, Einstein, Riya, Lena, Rae, Dr. Maya, Mason)
  • Apple Silicon M3+ on macOS 26 (Tahoe) or later
